text:
Secret Cape 秘密のマント - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

|bgcolor="DAFDDA" align=center|Secret Cape
|align=center|秘密のマント 
ひみつのまんと 
(Himitsu no Manto)
|bgcolor="DAFDDA" align=center|(Cloak of Secrecy)
|

|align=center colspan="3"|#095
|
|-

|align=center colspan="3"|Rank: A 
Transformation: 20
|
|-
!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|You will be under the effect of "Blackout Curtain" while wearing this cape.
|
|-

|align=center colspan="3"|(unknown)
|

Summary

Secret Cape 秘密のマント - This card allows the caster to summon a Secret Cape. While the user is wearing this cape, it will provide him with the same protection as Blackout Curtain. If the cape is destroyed or removed, so does this effect.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.095 :: 秘密のマント 
身につけていると永続的に「暗幕」の効果が得られる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.095 :: Secret Cape 
The effect of Blackout Curtain is in effect whilst wearing this cape.
|}
